---
title:  
    "Fixation dynamics of EXPIII"
date: 
    "June 30th, 2024"
author:  
    "Ali Movasati"  
output:  
    html_document:
        #css: style.css
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 2
        toc_float: true
        number_sections: true
        theme: lumen
        highlight: zenburn
        code_folding: hide
        code_download: true # to make the Rmd source code available
---




```{r loading libraries, echo=FALSE}

# loading libraries
library("ggplot2")
library("ggpubr")
library("plotly")
library("ggvenn")
library("hrbrthemes")
library("DT")
library("dplyr")
library("tidyr")
library("Biostrings")
library("stringr")
library("magrittr")
library("rstatix")
library("gtools")
library("effsize")


```


```{r read-in the data}

# determine the server path

if (file.exists("/home/amovas/")){
  print("Remote HPC Connection!")
  wd <- "/home/amovas/data/genome-evo-proj/"
} else {
  print("Local PC Connection!")
  wd <- "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/"
}

# load data
variants_ann <- read.table(file = paste0(wd, "results/tables/pipeline-outputs/all_annotated_variants.tsv.gz"), 
sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, header = TRUE)


# correct for the switched experimental lines
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 15 & variants_ann$passage > 360] <- "A"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 16 & variants_ann$passage > 360] <- "B"

variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "A"] <- "16"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "B"] <- "15"


# only keep the EXPIII data
exp <- "EXPIII"
end_psg <- 500

variants_ann_expiii <- variants_ann %>% filter(exp_line %in% 13:16,
        passage <= end_psg) 


# facors

host_factor <- c("MT2", "MT4")
exp_line_factor <- c("MT-2_1", "MT-2_2", "MT-4_1", "MT-4_2")

translational_impacts <- c("U", "S", "N")
gene_factor <- c("gag", "pol", "vif", "vpr", "tat", "rev", "vpu", "envelope", "nef")
feature_factor <- c("5utr", "gag", "pol", "vif", "vpr", "tat1", "rev1", "vpu", "envelope", "tat2", "rev2", "nef", "3utr")

# format the dataframe
variants_ann_expiii <- variants_ann_expiii %>%
                            mutate(host_line = ifelse(exp_line %in% c("13", "14"), "MT2", "MT4"), # set host cell line info
                            exp_line = case_when(exp_line==13 ~ "MT-2_1", exp_line==14 ~ "MT-2_2", exp_line==15 ~ "MT-4_1", exp_line==16 ~ "MT-4_2"), # update exp line labels
                            mut_info = paste(genomic_pos, ref_allele, alt_allele, sep = "_")) %>% 
                            mutate(effect_simplified = case_when(effect == "synonymous_variant" ~ "S", effect == "untranslated_region" ~ "U")) %>%
                            mutate(effect_simplified = replace_na(effect_simplified, "N")) %>%
                            mutate(passage = as.factor(passage),
                            exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
                            host_line = factor(host_line, levels = host_factor),
                            effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts)) 


# remove duplicate records for the same variants
variants_expiii <- variants_ann_expiii %>% filter(!duplicated(variant_id))

# Visualization settings

line_palette <- c("#ff00ff", "#ff2400", "#6600cc", "#0000ff")
breaks_step <- 50
line_labels <- c("MT-2_1", "MT-2_2", "MT-4_1", "MT-4_2")


```



# Accumulation

```{r set paramters}

# set parameters
category <- "Fixed"

if (category == "Sporadic"){
    min_threshold <- 0.01
    max_threshold <- 0.05
} else if (category == "Minority"){
    min_threshold <- 0.05
    max_threshold <- 0.5
} else if (category == "Majority"){
    min_threshold <- 0.5
    max_threshold <- 1.01
} else if (category == "Fixed"){
    min_threshold <- 0.99
    max_threshold <- 1.01
}

```





```{r average time to fixation calculation}

# record at what passages the fixed mutations first appeared and reached fixation (AF above 0.99)
df <- data.frame()

for (exp_line in line_labels){
    variants_expiii_sub <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$exp_line == exp_line,]
    fixed_muts <- unique(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99])
    for (mut in fixed_muts){
        appearance <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.05])))
        fixation <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99])))
        translational_impact <- unique(as.character(variants_expiii_sub$effect_simplified[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut]))
        df <- rbind(df, c(exp_line, mut, translational_impact, appearance, fixation, fixation-appearance))
    }
}

# set column names and right data types
df %<>% set_colnames(c("exp_line", "mut_info", "effect_simplified", "appearance", "fixation", "time_to_fixation")) %>% 
        mutate_at(4:6, as.integer) %>%
        mutate(exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
        mut_info = paste(exp_line, mut_info, sep = "_"),
        host_line = if_else(str_detect(exp_line, pattern = "MT-2"), "MT-2", "MT-4"),
        effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts))

```


```{r visualization1: time-to-fixation}
# density of time_to_fixation distributions
fig <- df %>% ggplot(aes(x = time_to_fixation, color = exp_line)) +
                    facet_wrap(~exp_line, ncol = 2) +
                    geom_density() +
                    scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette)

fig


# perform pairwise wilcox-test between translation impact groups per exp line

pwc <- df %>%
    group_by(exp_line) %>%
    pairwise_wilcox_test(
        time_to_fixation ~ effect_simplified,
        p.adjust.method = "none",
        detailed = TRUE
    )

# Visualization: box plots with p-values

low<-findInterval(max(df$time_to_fixation),c(5,10,20,50,100))
step <- c(5,10,20,50,100)[low - 1]

#Add x position
pwc <- pwc %>% add_xy_position(x = "effect_simplified", step.increase = 1)
# assign new y.positions 
pwc$y.position <- sample(seq(500,700,10), replace = F, size = 12)
# make the plot
fig2 <- ggboxplot(df, x = "effect_simplified", y = "time_to_fixation", color = "exp_line") +
    facet_wrap(~exp_line, ncol = 2) +
    labs(x = "Translational Impact", y = "Time to Fixation", color = "Virus Line")+
    scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0,max(df$time_to_fixation)+step,step)) +
    stat_pvalue_manual(pwc, hide.ns = TRUE, label = "p.adj") 


fig2

# perform pairwise wilcox-test between exp line groups per translation impact
pwc <- df %>%
    group_by(effect_simplified) %>%
    pairwise_wilcox_test(time_to_fixation ~ exp_line, p.adjust.method = "BH",pool.sd=FALSE, detailed = T)

#Add x position
pwc <- pwc %>% add_xy_position(x = "exp_line", step.increase = 1)
# assign new y.positions 
pwc$y.position <- sample(seq(500,750,10), replace = F, size = 18)
# make the plot
fig3 <- ggboxplot(df, x = "exp_line", y = "time_to_fixation", color = "exp_line") +
    facet_wrap(~effect_simplified, ncol = 3) +
    labs(x = "Virus Line", y = "Time to Fixation", color = "Virus Line")+
    scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0,max(df$time_to_fixation)+step,step)) +
    stat_pvalue_manual(pwc, hide.ns = TRUE, label = "p.adj") 

fig3

# perform pairwise wilcox-test between host line groups per translation impact

pwc <- df %>%
    # filter(mut_info %in% shared) %>%
    group_by(effect_simplified) %>%
    pairwise_wilcox_test(time_to_fixation ~ host_line, p.adjust.method = "BH",pool.sd=FALSE, detailed = T)

#Add x position
pwc <- pwc %>% add_xy_position(x = "host_line", step.increase = 1)
# assign new y.positions 
pwc$y.position <- sample(seq(500,750,10), replace = F, size = 3)
# make the plot
fig4 <- ggboxplot(df, x = "host_line", y = "time_to_fixation", color = "host_line") +
    facet_wrap(~effect_simplified, ncol = 3) +
    labs(x = "\nVirus Line", y = "Time to Fixation\n", color = "Virus Line")+
    scale_color_manual(labels = c("MT-2", "MT-4"), values = c("red", "blue")) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0,max(df$time_to_fixation)+step,step), limit = c(0,800)) +
    stat_pvalue_manual(pwc, hide.ns = TRUE, label = "p.adj", size = 8) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 55, hjust = 0.5),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 45),
            axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, face="bold"),
            axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30),
            strip.text.x = element_text(size = 35),
            legend.title = element_text(size=40),
            legend.text = element_text(size = 35))

fig4


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "time_to_fixation_per_density.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "time_to_fixation_significance_boxplot_per_line.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig2
dev.off()
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "time_to_fixation_significance_boxplot_per_translation_group.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig3
dev.off()
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "time_to_fixation_significance_boxplot_per_translation_group_host_line.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig4
dev.off()




# get inline variables
a <- min(df$time_to_fixation)
b <- nrow(df[df$time_to_fixation==0,])


```


```{r visualization11: time-to-fixation over time}

# time_to_fixation distributions per function of appearance time

fig <- df %>% ggplot(aes(x = appearance, y = time_to_fixation, color = exp_line, shape = effect_simplified)) +
                    facet_wrap(~exp_line, ncol = 2) +
                    geom_point() +
                    geom_hline(yintercept = 100) +
                    scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette)

fig


bins <- seq(0,400, 100)

df_summary <- df[df$time_to_fixation <= 100,] %>%
        mutate(bin = cut(appearance, breaks = bins, right = FALSE)) %>%
        group_by(exp_line,effect_simplified) %>%
        count(bin, .drop = FALSE)

df_summary <- df_summary[!is.na(df_summary$bin),]

fig <- ggplot(df_summary, aes(x = effect_simplified, y = n, fill = bin)) +
  facet_wrap(~exp_line, ncol = 2) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette) +
  labs(title = "Frequency of Rapidly Fixating Mutations over Time", x = "Translational Impact", y = "Nr. of Fixed Mutations \n with Time to Fixation below 100", fill = "Appearnace Bin") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, face="bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 20, angle=90),
        legend.title = element_text(size=20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 15))

fig

# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "Rapidly_Fixating_Mutations_over_Time.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()

```


```{r}

# set column names and right data types
df %<>% set_colnames(c("exp_line", "mut_info", "effect_simplified", "appearance", "fixation", "time_to_fixation")) %>% 
        mutate_at(4:6, as.integer) %>%
        mutate(exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
        effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts))



dff <- df %>% group_by(mut_info) %>%
    summarize(Mean = mean(time_to_fixation, na.rm=TRUE),
            n = n())

dff[dff$mut_info == "7854_A_G",]
dff[dff$Mean == max(dff$Mean[dff$n == 4]),]


# view the frequency dynamics of one fixed mutation
df[df$mut_info == "MT-2_1_566_G_A",]

fig <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$mut_info %in% "566_G_A",] %>% ggplot(aes(x = passage, y = allele_freq, color = exp_line)) +
    geom_line(aes(group = exp_line)) +
    scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.01, lty = "dashed")+
    theme(legend.position="none") 

fig

pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "time_to_fixation_case.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()


```





```{r time-to-fixation over time}

# record at what passages the fixed mutations first appeared and reached fixation (AF above 0.99)
df <- data.frame()

for (exp_line in line_labels){
    variants_expiii_sub <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$exp_line == exp_line,]
    fixed_muts <- unique(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.5])
    for (mut in fixed_muts){
        appearance <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.05])))
        af_fold_change <- variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$passage == appearance + 20]/variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$passage == appearance]
        if (length(af_fold_change) == 0){af_fold_change <- 0}
        translational_impact <- unique(as.character(variants_expiii_sub$effect_simplified[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut]))
        df <- rbind(df, c(exp_line, mut, translational_impact, appearance, af_fold_change))
    }
}

# set column names and right data types
df %<>% set_colnames(c("exp_line", "mut_info", "effect_simplified", "appearance", "af_fold_change")) %>% 
        mutate_at(4:5, as.numeric) %>%
        mutate(exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
        mut_info = paste(exp_line, mut_info, sep = "_"),
        effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts))

# summarize time to fixation per passage of appearance
df_summary <- df %>% group_by(exp_line, appearance, effect_simplified) %>%
                    summarize(Mean = median(af_fold_change, na.rm=TRUE),
                    n = n())

line <- "MT-2_2"
lm(df_summary$Mean[df_summary$effect_simplified == "U" & df_summary$exp_line == line] ~ df_summary$appearance[df_summary$effect_simplified == "U" & df_summary$exp_line == line])

# visualize time to fixation summary
fig <- df_summary[df_summary$effect_simplified == "S",] %>% ggplot(aes(x = appearance, y = Mean, group = exp_line, color = exp_line)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point(aes(size = n)) +
    facet_wrap(~exp_line, ncol = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 25),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, angle = 90),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.title = element_text(size=20),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15))
fig


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "time_to_fixation_per_passage.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()


```



```{r time-to-fixation over time2}

# record at what passages the fixed mutations first appeared and reached fixation (AF above 0.99)
df <- data.frame()

for (exp_line in line_labels){
    variants_expiii_sub <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$exp_line == exp_line,]
    fixed_muts <- unique(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99])
    for (mut in fixed_muts){
        appearance <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.01])))
        fixation <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99])))
        translational_impact <- unique(as.character(variants_expiii_sub$effect_simplified[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut]))
        df <- rbind(df, c(exp_line, mut, translational_impact, appearance, fixation, fixation-appearance))
    }
}

# set column names and right data types
df %<>% set_colnames(c("exp_line", "mut_info", "effect_simplified", "appearance", "fixation", "time_to_fixation")) %>% 
        mutate_at(4:6, as.integer) %>%
        mutate(exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
        effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts))



# summarize time to fixation per passage of appearance
df_summary <- df %>% group_by(exp_line, appearance) %>%
                    summarize(Med = median(time_to_fixation, na.rm=TRUE),
                    n = n())

# visualize time to fixation summary
fig <- df_summary %>% ggplot(aes(x = appearance, y = Med, group = exp_line, color = exp_line)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point(aes(size = n)) +
    facet_wrap(~exp_line, ncol = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 25),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, angle = 90),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.title = element_text(size=20),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15))
fig


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "time_to_fixation_per_passage.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()


```



```{r fixation time based on number of recurrence}
# record at what passages the fixed mutations first appeared and reached fixation (AF above 0.99)
df <- data.frame()

for (exp_line in line_labels){
    variants_expiii_sub <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$exp_line == exp_line,]
    fixed_muts <- unique(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99])
    for (mut in fixed_muts){
        appearance <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.01])))
        fixation <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99])))
        translational_impact <- unique(as.character(variants_expiii_sub$effect_simplified[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut]))
        df <- rbind(df, c(exp_line, mut, translational_impact, appearance, fixation, fixation-appearance))
    }
}

# set column names and right data types
df %<>% set_colnames(c("exp_line", "mut_info", "effect_simplified", "appearance", "fixation", "time_to_fixation")) %>% 
        mutate_at(4:6, as.integer) %>%
        mutate(exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
        effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts))


# average time to fixation for fixated mutations based on how many times they are repeated

fix_count_table <- table(variants_expiii$mut_info[variants_expiii$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii$passage == end_psg])

fix_count_table_list <- list("4" = fix_count_table[fix_count_table==4],
    "3" = fix_count_table[fix_count_table==3],
    "2" = fix_count_table[fix_count_table==2],
    "1" = fix_count_table[fix_count_table==1])




df$Occurrence <- NA
df$Occurrence[df$mut_info %in% names(fix_count_table_list[["1"]])] <- "One"
df$Occurrence[df$mut_info %in% names(fix_count_table_list[["2"]])] <- "Two"
df$Occurrence[df$mut_info %in% names(fix_count_table_list[["3"]])] <- "Three"
df$Occurrence[df$mut_info %in% names(fix_count_table_list[["4"]])] <- "Four"
df <- df[!is.na(df$Occurrence),]
df$Occurrence <- factor(df$Occurrence, levels = c("One", "Two", "Three", "Four"))


comparisons <- list(
  c("Four", "Three"),
  c("Four", "Two"),
  c("Four", "One"),
  c("Three", "Two"),
  c("Three", "One"),
  c("Two", "One")
)



# Create the plot
fig <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Occurrence, y=time_to_fixation, fill = Occurrence)) + 
    geom_boxplot(color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = comparisons, method = "wilcox.test") +
    # scale_fill_manual(values = c("Group 1" = "#E69F00", "Group 2" = "#56B4E9", "Group 3" = "#7CE335", "Group 4" = "#F3567C")) +
    labs(fill = "Occurrence", x= "Occurrence", y = "Time to Fixation", title = "Fixation Dynamics Based on Variant Recurrence\n") + # Label for the legend
    theme_minimal() + # Optional: use a minimal theme
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 25),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, angle = 90),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.title = element_text(size=20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 15)) 



# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "fixation-based-on-recurrence.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()

mean(df$time_to_fixation[df$mut_info %in% names(fix_count_table_list[["1"]])])


t.test(df$time_to_fixation[df$mut_info %in% names(fix_count_table_list[["3"]])],df$time_to_fixation[df$mut_info %in% names(fix_count_table_list[["1"]])])


```


```{r max-fold-increase processing}


# # record at what passages the fixed mutations first appeared and reached fixation (AF above 0.99)
# df <- data.frame()

# for (exp_line in line_labels){
#     variants_expiii_sub <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$exp_line == exp_line,]
#     fixed_muts <- unique(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99])
#     for (mut in fixed_muts){
#         appearance <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.01])))
#         fixation <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99])))
#         translational_impact <- unique(as.character(variants_expiii_sub$effect_simplified[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut]))
        
#         psgs <- seq(appearance, fixation, by = 10)
#         recordings <- data.frame()
        
#         for (i in 1:(length(psgs)-1)){
#             prev <- variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$passage == psgs[i]] # & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq > 0.01
#             current <- variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$passage == psgs[i+1]] #  & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq > 0.01
#             if (length(c(prev,current)) == 2){
#                 recordings <- rbind(recordings, c(psgs[i], psgs[i+1], current/prev))
#             }
#         }
        
#         if (nrow(recordings) != 0){
#             df <- rbind(df, c(exp_line, mut, translational_impact, appearance, fixation, fixation-appearance,as.numeric(recordings[which.max(recordings[,3]),])))
#         } else {
#             df <- rbind(df, c(exp_line, mut, translational_impact, appearance, fixation, fixation-appearance,rep(NA,3)))
#         }
#     }
# }



# # set column names and right data types
# df %<>% set_colnames(c("exp_line", "mut_info", "effect_simplified", "appearance", "fixation", "time_to_fixation", "max_psg_lower", "max_psg_upper", "max_fold_change")) %>% 
#         mutate_at(4:6, as.integer) %>%
#         filter(!is.na(max_fold_change)) %>%
#         mutate(max_psg_range = paste(max_psg_lower, max_psg_upper, sep = "_")) %>%
#         mutate(max_psg_range = factor(max_psg_range),
#         exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
#         effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts))



# df %<>% mutate(max_fold_change = as.numeric(max_fold_change))
# df %<>% mutate(max_psg_range = factor(max_psg_range, levels = mixedsort(c(levels(max_psg_range),"370_380", "380_390", "390_400","420_430", "430_440", "440_450", "450_460", "460_470", "470_480", "480_490", "490_500"))))





# saveRDS(df, file = "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/results/tables/misc/max_fold_inc.rds")
# saveRDS(df, file = "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/results/tables/misc/max_fold_inc_2.rds") ## appearance without the minimum threshold of 0.01

```

```{r max-fold-increase (Bertels)}

max_fold <- readRDS(file = "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/results/tables/misc/max_fold_inc.rds")


# axis text label data frame
breaks <- seq(10,490,10)
labels <- paste0(breaks, "_", breaks+10)



fig <- max_fold %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = as.numeric(max_psg_lower), y = log2(max_fold_change), color = exp_line)) +
  # facet_wrap(~exp_line) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +  # Add regression line without confidence interval
  scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,490), breaks = breaks, labels = labels) +
  labs(title = "Maximum Fold Increase Trend over Time \n", x = "\n Transfer", y = "Log2(Average Max. Fold Inc. in VF) \n",
    color = "Virus Line") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                axis.title.x = element_text(size = 25),
                axis.title.y = element_text(size = 25),
                axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, color = "black", angle = 90),
                axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"))



mean(max_fold$max_fold_change[max_fold$exp_line %in% c("MT-2_1","MT-2_2")])/mean(max_fold$max_fold_change[max_fold$exp_line %in% c("MT-4_1","MT-4_2")])
wilcox.test(max_fold$max_fold_change[max_fold$exp_line %in% c("MT-2_1","MT-2_2")], max_fold$max_fold_change[max_fold$exp_line %in% c("MT-4_1","MT-4_2")])
cliff.delta(max_fold$max_fold_change[max_fold$exp_line %in% c("MT-2_1","MT-2_2")], max_fold$max_fold_change[max_fold$exp_line %in% c("MT-4_1","MT-4_2")])

# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "fixed_max_fold_change_occurrence_trend.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()


```


```{r max-fold-increase per appearance time}

# summarize time to fixation per passage of appearance
max_fold_summary <- max_fold %>% group_by(exp_line, appearance) %>%
                    summarize(Mean = mean(max_fold_change, na.rm=TRUE),
                    n = n())


# fit linear models for each group and extract p-values
model_A <- lm(log(Mean)~appearance, data = max_fold_summary[max_fold_summary$exp_line == line_labels[1], ])
model_B <- lm(log(Mean)~appearance, data = max_fold_summary[max_fold_summary$exp_line == line_labels[2], ])
model_C <- lm(log(Mean)~appearance, data = max_fold_summary[max_fold_summary$exp_line == line_labels[3], ])
model_D <- lm(log(Mean)~appearance, data = max_fold_summary[max_fold_summary$exp_line == line_labels[4], ])


# extract the p-values
p_value_A <- summary(model_A)$coefficients[2, 4]  
p_value_B <- summary(model_B)$coefficients[2, 4]
p_value_C <- summary(model_C)$coefficients[2, 4]  
p_value_D <- summary(model_D)$coefficients[2, 4]

# create a data.frame for annotation
p_value_df <- data.frame(exp_line = line_labels, p_val = c(p_value_A, p_value_B, p_value_C, p_value_D))


line <- "MT-4_2"
model <- lm(log(Mean)~appearance, data = max_fold_summary[max_fold_summary$exp_line == line,])
summary(model)


fig <- max_fold_summary %>% ggplot(aes(x = appearance, y = log(Mean), color = exp_line)) +
    facet_wrap(~exp_line)+
    geom_point(aes(size = n)) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
    xlim(limits = c(0,500)) +
    geom_text(data = p_value_df, aes(x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste0("P.value = ", round(p_val, 3))),
    hjust = 1.1, vjust = 2, size = 5, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette) +
    labs(title = "Maximum Fold Increase Based on Appearance Transfer \n", x = "\n Appearance Transfer", y = "Log2(Average Max. Fold Inc. in VF) \n",
    color = "Virus Line", size = "# Fixed Variants") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                axis.title.x = element_text(size = 25),
                axis.title.y = element_text(size = 25),
                axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, color = "black", angle = 90),
                axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"),
                strip.text = element_text(size = 15))


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "fixed_max_fold_change_per_appearance_transfer.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()

```





```{r misc}

df <- data.frame()

for (exp_line in line_labels){
    variants_expiii_sub <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$exp_line == exp_line,]
    fixed_muts <- unique(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99])
    for (mut in fixed_muts){
        appearance <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.01])))
        af_fold_change <- variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$passage == appearance + 10]/variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$passage == appearance]
        if (length(af_fold_change) == 0){af_fold_change <- 0}
        translational_impact <- unique(as.character(variants_expiii_sub$effect_simplified[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut]))
        df <- rbind(df, c(exp_line, mut, translational_impact, appearance, af_fold_change))
    }
}

# set column names and right data types
df %<>% set_colnames(c("exp_line", "mut_info", "effect_simplified", "appearance", "af_fold_change")) %>% 
        mutate_at(4:5, as.numeric) %>%
        mutate(exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
        effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts))

dff<- data.frame()
for (mut in unique(df$mut_info)){
    if (all(any(str_detect(df$exp_line[df$mut_info == mut], pattern = "MT-2")),any(str_detect(df$exp_line[df$mut_info == mut], pattern = "MT-4")))){
        MT2 <- mean(df$af_fold_change[df$mut_info == mut & str_detect(df$exp_line,pattern = "MT-2")])
        MT4 <- mean(df$af_fold_change[df$mut_info == mut & str_detect(df$exp_line,pattern = "MT-4")])
        translational_impact <- unique(as.character(df$effect_simplified[df$mut_info == mut]))
        dff <- rbind(dff, c(mut,translational_impact,MT2,MT4))
    }
}




dff %<>% set_colnames(c("mut_info", "translational_impact","mt2", "mt4"))

plot(dff$mt2[dff$translational_impact == "N"], dff$mt4[dff$translational_impact == "N"])

cor.test(as.numeric(dff$mt2[dff$translational_impact == "S"]), as.numeric(dff$mt4[dff$translational_impact == "S"]), method = "spearman")



```
